reviews.review_title: I love this game. Wish there was more.
reviews.review_description: This game at first. I thought was just another one of those workout games where it just boring. Or those. Meditation games where you don't do anything and just sit there and just stare at a galexy moving. But this game gave me the best thing close to having a vivid dream. It is exactly what I dream in a vivid dream. So now people who wishes to vivid dream can see how it feels! On vr! They flying thing. Oh don't get me started I felt like I had wings and I was a Goddess flying. I love it. I wish there was more. The journey is very very long. But to be honest I want more. I sound greedy but just saying. It's amazing. I highly recommend it to almost everyone. Also I suggest you sit down and play so you don't fall over while flying. Learned that the hard way 😅 it also gives you a very long time to explore, and there is no time limit. Just you and the universe. It's a relaxing game and I almost fell asleep to the calming music a lot of times.

reviews.review_title: Everyone with a quest should play ts

reviews.review_description: I had hoped this would be a game like Tripp (that you could enjoy while high) but it just made me feel sick and nauseated instead.  I downloaded Island Universe last night, and couldn't figure out how to use the controls - very confusing.  But even today after my trip, something about the game gives me vertigo and motion sickness.  No other app or game for the Meta Quest 2 has ever done this before, so it can't be just a problem on my end?  But I see plenty of other people enjoy Island Universe, so I guess if the price is still free (as it is here in  July 2025) it's worth your time to download the game anyway, and try it out for yourself.  Just don't expect clear directions or any kind of instruction manual, or guide how to play or what to do, because there is none.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! From the starting menu of the game there are options to use teleport locomotion and snap turning to reduce motion sickness, as well as a controller diagram showing the controls. Note that the flying mechanic is mostly optional and you can progress through the 99% of the game via teleporting around if you are prone to motion sickness. As far as what to do in the game, its purely exploration! Wander around and see what you find!

reviews.review_description: The flying is exactly like it is in my dreams. Very fun to explore.

This just has to be played to be understood. It's more a journey of the mind than anything else. The worlds are very inventively designed and a lot of fun to explore. It gives me a feeling...not many VR games have done that.

l i n k t r . e e

q u a c k b i r t h

reviews.review_title: Amazingly detailed and well thought out!
reviews.review_description: This game has a ton of details and hidden surprises! You could easily spend a few hours looking around and exploring.

Great little game, I played through it (it’s not super long, but long enough) and enjoyed it, but didn’t fully enjoy it until my second walk through.

If you’re looking for a trippy game with visuals and feelings that make you feel some special way, I totally recommend this game. 

Another recommendation i have used try to use the flying as little as possible, because walking through this game is the real deal. On my second go around I found myself just sitting in different locations to take in the sights. Definitely enjoyed, and definitely would recommend.
I've played this game since it's first alpha release and I have enjoyed it so much.  There is a lot to see and experience.  Take your time and enjoy the environments.  Highly recommend.

Amazing game!1!1!1!! 10/10 add 10 more levels (i have not opened the game yet)
